arts.ttl: Arsenal drop quadruple team news hints for West Ham as Raheem Sterling decision made
arts.sum: As Arsenal prepare to host West Ham in the Premier League this Saturday, the question Mikel Arteta must answer appears to be how he utilises his limited attacking options rather than the focus being on who starts. Arsenal themselves have hinted that the Spaniard will have a big part to play again as he takes a central position in Saturday's matchday graphic on Instagram, joined by Martin Odegaard, Declan Rice and Nwaneri.

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs West Ham predicted as Mikel Arteta's side look to close Liverpool gap
arts.sum: With Liverpool drawing 2-2 against Aston Villa midweek, Arsenal currently sit eight points behind their title rivals in the Premier League table, with Mikel Arteta's side having a game in hand on the Reds. Arsenal can close the gap between themselves and Liverpool at the top of the Premier League table to just five points later today with a win against West Ham United.

arts.ttl: Arsenal and Tottenham on alert as Matheus Cunha speaks out again on Wolves transfer
arts.sum: In-demand Wolves star Matheus Cunha has told potential suitors like Arsenal and Tottenham Hotspur that he has never given a second thought towards leaving Molineux. As the recent January transfer window played out in full, both north London clubs appeared to be in competition with one another for the recruitment of additional firepower.

arts.ttl: Arsenal, Chelsea and Tottenham ‘offering €100m’ for 11-goal Englishman
arts.sum: Arsenal, Chelsea and Tottenham are hoping to sign the Borussia Dortmund winger Jamie Gittens during the summer transfer window. All three clubs are keen on securing the signature of the 20-year-old attacker and they are offering €100 million in order to get the deal done. arts.ttl: West Ham join Italian giants in race to sign Lille’s Jonathan David
arts.sum: The weeks tick down to the end of the season and there are still no signs of Jonathan David (25) renewing his contract at Lille OSC. The Guardian understands that the Canada…

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs West Ham LIVE: Premier League team news and line-ups as Gunners face Mikel Merino decision
arts.sum: The Gunners hope to close the gap on Liverpool with win over the Hammers

arts.ttl: Matheus Cunha makes brutal transfer admission as Arsenal, Chelsea and Man Utd circle
arts.sum: Cunha was one of the hottest talking points during the January transfer window, when speculation over his contract with Wolves generated rumours that all three Premier League giants could make a spectacular mid-season swoop. Wolves attacker Matheus Cunha has made a frank admission about his future, following claims that Arsenal, Chelsea, Manchester United, and Tottenham Hotspur are all interested in him.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta issues challenge to Ethan Nwaneri after Arsenal youngster's surprise
arts.sum: Arsenal have been pleasantly taken aback by Ethan Nwaneri's seamless transition to becoming a first-team regular as Mikel Arteta calls on him to produce consistently

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta could use 'sensational' Arsenal player for the first time this year vs West Ham - opinion
Jorthy Mokio: Chelsea lead Arsenal for Ajax star who can become the new Declan Rice
arts.sum: Arsenal, Chelsea and Manchester City are among the Premier League giants following the progress of 16-year-old Ajax sensation Jorthy Mokio. Chelsea lead Arsenal for Ajax star who can become the new Declan Rice
